title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0473
summary: Sharwari Alagharu, accused No.5, sought anticipatory bail fearing arrest in a dowry harassment case registered in Hyderabad. The complainant, her daughter-in-law, alleged that a dowry of Rs.50 lakhs and other articles was paid at marriage, and she was later harassed and thrown out of the house.
